reviewerNotes: Reviewed as an accepted non-secure bug fix with matching non-secure tests and package size-budget adjustment.
No blocker is expected after NanoID policy was narrowed to distinguish size-limit package changes from version/dependency metadata changes.
Reviewed as a release metadata PR where package.json, jsr.json and changelog moved together.
No lockfile blocker is expected because the patch changes package version metadata, not dependency metadata.
Reviewed as a comment-only formatting change inside index.js.
No paired type declaration or test blocker is expected because exported runtime behavior did not change.
Reviewed as a core performance optimization with browser/node implementation updates and tests.
Package.json size-limit changes are considered an allowed performance budget update, not dependency metadata drift.
Reviewed as a browser performance micro-change with a package size-budget update.
No dependency or release metadata blocker is expected.
Reviewed as a Node runtime micro-optimization that reuses an expression result.
No paired declaration blocker is expected because public API shape did not change.
Reviewed as a browser behavior fix with matching tests and package size-budget adjustment.
No dependency metadata blocker is expected.
Reviewed as a documentation translation update.
Docs-only translation edits are in allowed scope and require no runtime findings.
Reviewed as a documentation translation link update.
Docs-only translation edits are in allowed scope and require no runtime findings.
Reviewed as a JSDoc example correction in index.d.ts.
Types authority is sufficient because the change is documentation inside the type declaration surface.
Reviewed as a root README maintenance update.
Docs-only root README edits are in allowed scope and require no runtime findings.
Reviewed as a lockfile-only dependency metadata update produced by dependency maintenance.
The bounded runtime currently treats lockfile-only dependency maintenance as allowed when no forbidden or sensitive paths are touched.
